description_long: This ottoman features a boxy, square form with softly rounded edges and a thick, cushioned top. The upholstery is a rich, chocolate brown faux leather with a prominent diamond-quilted pattern on the sides, each diamond accentuated by subtle tufting. The top cushion is smooth and slightly domed, providing a plush, inviting surface for sitting or resting feet. There are no visible legs, giving the ottoman a grounded, monolithic appearance. The seam between the cushion and the base is neatly stitched, adding a touch of refinement. Its overall design is modern and versatile, suitable for urban interiors, lobbies, or public seating areas.
description: A square, brown faux leather ottoman with a smooth cushioned top and diamond-quilted, tufted sides. It has a modern, legless design and a plush, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diamond-quilted, tufted side and the smooth, thick cushion top with visible seam.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same quilted pattern and the rounded, plush cushion top, with no visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, displaying the diamond-tufted side and smooth cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the quilted pattern and seamless, rounded cushion top.
